cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 1938 · 武漢
cover.subtitle:
중국 관내 최초의
한인 무장 부대.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-Joseon-to-Japanese-occupation illustration. Dark blue-gray, crimson accent, sepia. ONE Korean independence leader (Kim Won-bong) in dark Chinese-style military jacket with high collar, neatly combed hair, determined frontal view. Behind him: silhouettes of three Korean soldiers in Chinese Nationalist Army-style uniforms standing in formation. Background: a Chinese pagoda rooftop and brick wall suggesting Wuhan. Color: dark blue-gray + ink-black, accent of crimson on a small banner shape (no text). Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.title: 관내 최초
items.desc: 중국 관내 최초의 한인 정규 무장.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 김원봉의 활동 흐름(의열단→민족혁명당→의용대→광복군), 우한 창설 시기, 화북 분화와 호가장 전투, 의용군과 광복군의 계열 차이가 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small banner silhouette suggesting an independence army flag. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
